scorePolicy.description: daily top-seller frequency + rank points, then recommendationCount and official auxiliary signals
scorePolicy.auxiliaryTransform: max(1, 101 - best official rank) for featured and fresh most-played signals
scorePolicy.slugPolicy: slugHint is title kebab only; import verification freezes base, then release year, then AppID on collision
